import React, { useState, useEffect } from "react"; import "./Profile.css"; import Moon from "../../Image/moon.png"; import Mountain_behind from "../../Image/Mountain_behind.png"; import Mountain_front from "../../Image/Mountain_front.png"; import Stars from "../../Image/stars.png"; import Someone from "../../Image/someone.png"; import Im from "../../Image/Im.png"; import aboutMe from "../../Image/aboutme.png"; import menuPhone from "../../Image/menuPhone.png"; import menuResume from "../../Image/menuResume.png"; import myImage from "../../Image/myImage.png"; import myProject from "../../Image/myProject.png"; import TypeWriterEffect from "react-typewriter-effect"; import { SiNodedotjs, SiReact, SiMysql, SiAdobephotoshop, SiAdobeillustrator, SiAdobexd, SiFigma, SiGit, SiCss3, SiHtml5, SiJavascript, } from "react-icons/si"; export default function Profile() { window.addEventListener("scroll", () => { let varlueScrol = window.scrollY; document.getElementById("stars").style.left = varlueScrol * 0.25 + "px"; document.getElementById("moon").style.marginTop = varlueScrol * 1.2 + "px"; document.getElementById("moon").style.left = varlueScrol * 0.5 + "px"; document.getElementById("mountain_behind").style.top = varlueScrol * 0.5 + "px"; document.getElementById("mountain_front").style.left = varlueScrol * 0 + "px"; // document.getElementById("text").style.marginRight = varlueScrol * 4 + "px"; // document.getElementById("text").style.marginTop = varlueScrol * 0.9 + "px"; // document.getElementById("btn").style.marginTop = varlueScrol * 0.7 + "px"; // document.getElementById("someone").style.marginLeft = // varlueScrol * 0.05 + "px"; }); const [showImgmenu, setShowImgmenu] = useState(false); function onHendleMenuImgEnter() { setShowImgmenu(true); } function onHendleMenuImgLeave() { setShowImgmenu(false); } return (
